user_query: I'm planning a surprise party for my best friend's birthday. Can you help me gather some information about her favorite Snapchat stories? Get me the data and story of her Snapchat username 'bestieforever'. Also, find some interesting Amazon products that I can gift her. Lastly, recommend a Youtube video that she might enjoy watching.

TaskList.description: Gather data from Snapchat for the user with the username 'bestieforever' including her favorite stories.
Search for interesting products on Amazon that can be used as gifts.
Recommend a Youtube video based on the interests of the friend.
required_inputs: interests or preferences of the friend
